description: Fired when a user successfully completes sign-in (including MFA if required). Used to track authentication conversion and identify users in PostHog.
Fired when a user successfully completes sign-up and email verification. Used to identify new users and track registration conversion.
Fired when a user taps the Sign Out button in Settings. Used to track churn signals and reset PostHog identity.
Fired when a user successfully verifies an MFA email code during sign-in. Tracks MFA completion rate.
Fired when a sign-in attempt results in an error. Helps identify authentication friction.
Fired when a sign-up attempt results in an error. Helps identify registration friction.
Fired when a user taps a subscription card to expand its details. Tracks engagement with subscription detail view.
Fired when a user lands on the onboarding screen. Top of the new-user conversion funnel.
Fired when a user opens the full subscription detail screen. Top of the subscription detail conversion funnel.
Fired when a user taps the add subscription icon on the home dashboard. Tracks intent to add a new subscription.
